# ARC Affiliates

> ARC Affiliates is a AI SEO automation platform for local service businesses (DIY alternative to SEO agencies) serving Wildwood, FL. Service area: The Villages, Orlando, Tampa. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

## About

- **Business:** ARC Affiliates
- **Industry:** AI SEO automation platform for local service businesses (DIY alternative to SEO agencies)
- **Primary location:** Wildwood, FL
- **Also serving:** Belleview, Leesburg, Sumterville, Fruitland Park, Lady Lake, Inverness
- **Website:** https://arcaffiliates.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.arcaffiliates.com/blog/

- **Voice:** professional

## Topics We Cover

ARC Affiliates SEO, ARC Affiliates pricing, ARC Affiliates reviews, ARC AI SEO platform, ARC AI SEO software, veteran-owned SEO software, veteran-built local SEO platform, military veteran SEO software, veteran-owned local SEO agency, local SEO software, local SEO platform, local SEO services

## Content Cadence

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of, how-to, pricing guides)
- Thursday: GEO/AEO content optimized for AI answer engines
